> Target branch: **`develop`** (queue). `master` is updated by the scrape/publish Action.

## Type

- [ ] Add job listing(s)
- [ ] Add/update data source
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Job Listing Checklist (if adding jobs)

- [ ] Each entry has a valid application URL
- [ ] Date is in YYYY-MM-DD format
- [ ] Company name is accurate
- [ ] Location is specific (City, State — not just "US")
- [ ] Category matches one from CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Entries added to `sources/community-jobs.json`
